source: Composite : MINESEC (lycees/colleges publics francophones) + GCE Board (GHS/GBHS/PSS anglophones) + Wikipedia FR + techno-science.net (cross-reference). Dataset V1 representatif ~250 ecoles couvrant les 10 regions du Cameroun. Suite via flow demande ajout Story 1.5.c.
comment: Dataset Story 1.5.a (Epic 1.5 Schools completion). Tous isValidated: true (sources officielles MINESEC/GCE). subSystem heuristique : francophone (Lycee/College FR), anglophone (Government High School / GHS / GBHS / PSS / Comprehensive College), both (Lycee Bilingue d'Application LBA + GBHS).
